title: Awesome YTP Intro!!
description:
For more videos visit my new channel, where I'm currently uploading new stuff!

Best random YTP Intro ever made!!!!!!!!!!!!

Ok.. No jokes now! It is just a silly idea I had some days ago! Before the correct one I tryed many times.. TOO MANY times...

Here you can watch the original one:
http://www.artoonix.com/UploadedFiles/YT%20INTRO.swf

The song which plays as my ringtone is "Running in the 90s"!
The song at the end is the Ghosts'n Goblins Theme, with my wonderful voice!
